text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I can still remember those deafening cheers of joy
and frustration.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It was the Derby. I was still a little rascal when my
pops brought me to the Tokyo Racecourse for the
first time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All of the racers were stone-cold serious. "I won't
let you win." "Get outta the way." "First place is
mine!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
With that aura about them, they launched
straight down the final stretch side by side,
knocking shoulders...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, while heading home on the back of
my dad's motorcycle, without fully realizing why, I
shouted out to him.

text_block_list.name: Young Vodka
text_block_list.text: Dad! I... I...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wanna grow up to be a cool Umamusume like
them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, Vodka and I begin our battle in
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She likes to play the delinquent, but her passion
for racing is real. She's probably here already...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. What's up, partner?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series starts today. Were you lookin'
for me?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Course I am! I've been lookin' forward to this for
so long. I'm gonna run my best from the very first
race.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Just like I flew past those ramps, I'm gonna move
faster than the wind, I tell ya!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pretty cool, am I right? Right?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heheh, you can say that again! Heheheh...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but this is no time to get cocky. The series is
just gettin' started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to brainstorm ideas to solidify a plan.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: My concrete goals? Hm...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I mean... I wanna be super cool! The coolest of all
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So, you gotta help me, Trainer! Gimme some
super cool advice!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's pretty concrete, right?
choice_data_list:
I think I'm gonna need a liiittle more to work
with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's made it really clear she wants to be cool,
but that doesn't tell me which races to aim for. I
ask if there are any she's interested in.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Of course there is! First...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run in the Derby! Imagine the intensity as
I go head-to-head with all those supercharged
racers!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I want the best of 'em all, Narita Brian, to
recognize my abilities.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
She defeated me pretty easily in a scrimmage
before, so I wanna show her what I'm really made
of. And then...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And then... Well, it's no big deal, but... there's
one more thing.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wanna shut up that pain in the butt who's always
blabbin' about being number one. If ya ask me,
she's the number one dummy!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Who are you calling the number one dummy?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What's so wrong with wanting to be number one?! You're the dummy, always obsessing about being cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(It's Vodka's rival, Daiwa Scarlet. Her aim is to be
number one.)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It just had to be you running with me in the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Why do you have to always copy me?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hah! Who'd ever wanna copy you?! It's just a
coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. Just don't get in my way—unless you
wanna get wrecked!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and give it your best shot! I'll gladly
make you the number one loser.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Say what you want while you can. The real
showdown is tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I know that. See you there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet perks up her shoulders and struts
away.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm gonna get cool—and shut her up while
I'm at it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right. Time to start runnin'.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You watchin', Dad? It's finally time for my debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks to the horizon and smiles, her eyes
lighting up like a child's.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, today marks the start of our partnership,
eh? So let's ditch the small talk and cut to the
chase.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's rev our motors and hit the road! We'll barrel
around the twists and turns up the cliffs till we get
to the view at the peak!
choice_data_list: Hit the... road? You mean like on a motorcycle?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wish! I've always wanted one, but I can't afford
one yet, so...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run instead! Perfect for training!
Hyahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka swishes her tail and runs off at full speed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's a bit rough around the edges, but her
heart's in the right place. All she thinks about is
being cool, and she's reckless at times, but still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't want her to be someone she's not. I want
her to run true to herself, until she becomes the
coolest Umamusume out there.
